debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ∏ p ∈ ⌊x⌋.natAbs.primesBelow, ∑' (k : ℕ), (↑p ^ k)⁻¹ ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simpa [inv_nonneg] using inv_nonneg.mpr this)
            exact hp'
          · intro p hp hpsub
            have hp1 : (1 : ℝ) < p := by
              have hpNat : 1 < p := by
                have : Nat.Prime p := by
                  simpa using (Nat.prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp)
                exact this.one_lt
              exact_mod_cast hpNat
            have hgeom :
                (∑' k : ℕ, (↑p ^ k : ℝ)⁻¹) = (p : ℝ) / ((p : ℝ) - 1) := by
              simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg,
                add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
                (Real.tsum_geometric_two (by
                  have : ‖(p : ℝ)⁻¹‖ < 1 := by
                    simpa [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_inv, abs_of_pos (by exact inv_pos.mpr (lt_trans (by
                      have : (0 : ℝ) < p := lt_trans (by linarith) hp1
                      exact this) (by linarith)))] using
                      (inv_lt_one_of_one_lt₀ (by linarith) hp1)
                  exact this))
            simpa [hgeom]
        have hmono :
            (∏ p ∈ ⌊x⌋.natAbs.primesBelow, (p : ℝ) / ((p : ℝ) - 1)) ≤
              ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1)) := by
          simpa using le_of_eq (by
            -- both sides are the same product, by definition of `primeCountingReal` and `nth Nat.Prime`
            rfl)
        exact le_trans this hmono
